text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking down the<n>hallway, I
hear a loud voice coming<n>from a classroom...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Dober! Your race today was awfully<n>impressive!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The way ya ran that final stretch was<n>somethin'
else! Ya had me<n>mesmerized, the way ya cut
through<n>the pack like a hot knife through<n>butter!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, show me a smile! You keep<n>gettin' all
quiet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-well, you have to give me a<n>heads-up before
starting the<n>compliments...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause I'm your fan, duh! You're<n>never
gonna get better at takin' a<n>compliment if I warn
ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I get a compliment, I show<n>'em a big
ol' smile 'cause I'm awful<n>happy! Don'tcha like
bein'<n>complimented?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I dislike it, but the thought<n>of being
watched so closely is a little<n>disconcerting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't even think... I'm worthy of<n>praise to begin
with—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Hmmmm?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Forget what I just said. I just need<n>to practice
mo—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm pickin' up what you're<n>puttin' down! So
what you're sayin'<n>is that you're not used to
'em!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-why is that your conclusion?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can help ya with that, piece of cake!<n>I just gotta
pile on the praise!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Rely on those guts of yours and build<n>up a
tolerance! Yeehaw! Time to get<n>trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're as reliable as the sunrise,<n>Dober! Not just
that, but you're<n>awfully kind and cool to boot!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're cute as a button when ya<n>snack on
parfaits! And your hair's so<n>silky and beautiful I
could just die!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's too much in one go!<n>There's no way I
can handle all of<n>that!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey! We're still just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Stop! Get back here!
